entry.title: Delivery Performance (F2783) Vocabulary Annotation File ‘xxxx’ version ‘0001’ not found on SAP GW
entry.content:
Hello,

I have integrated the app: Delivery Performance - Delivered as Requested
for Sales Manager (F2783) in the SAP launchpad.
The app also works perfectly on the development environment, but errors occur on the test environment.

One is the following:
VokabAnnotatDatei 'C_SLSORDDELIVPERFANLYTSQRY_C_VAN', Vers. '0001', not found on SAP gateway server

And also that an exception has occurred for the service C_SLSORDDELIVPERFANLYTSQRY_CDS.

I have already emptied the metadata cache with the transactions.
I have also loaded the metadata for the “CATALOGSERVICE” V2 service on the test environment, but it also says that the client cannot be changed.
That's why I did it on the development environment and transported it, but the same errors still occur here.

Can anyone help me here?

entry.title: Re: CDS view with Change Data Capture(CDC) for Replication Flow – Part 1
entry.content:
Hi @SayaniGhosal 

Is it possible to push data detected via CDC annotation to SAP AEM? Sometimes we just need to use delta changes to process them as events in AEM (Advanced Event Mesh) but would appreciate avoiding dependency on Datasphere to be able to process events from CDS Views. 

PS: ASAPIO does not detect CDS View CDC changes either. 

Thanks a bunch in advance,

Dani.

entry.title: SAP Fiori app to find out transactions for apps
entry.content:
Hello,

I have heard that there is an SAP Fiori app in which you can enter transactions and SAP Fiori apps are output that have the functions of the transaction.

Can anyone here give me more information or perhaps even know the app?

I would also like to know whether it actually works and produces good results.

Thank you very much!

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4 HANA iDoc CREDAT and CRETIM format changes sending via ALE
entry.content: As @helmut_skolaut3 said, we're missing the type of "IDoc Port" you are using, or any custom scenario to send the IDoc. With WE19, you select any IDoc Port you want, for test purpose. But in the real world, it can be Flat Text or XML File (then choose the way you want to send the file), HTTPS Flat Text or XML, etc. In XML format, the date and time formats are YYYY-MM-DD and HH:MM:SS.

entry.title: Re: No recipient found for message type PORDCH in the ALE modelMessage No. B1129
entry.content: Apparently, you didn't do the customizing in BD64 correctly. Check again.

entry.content: Thank you for your answer. Just for my clarity, is Git Server on ABAP and setting the ABAPGit (Online or Offline Repo)is different process ?

entry.title: Re: Deactivation of Compliance Requirements in SAP S/4HAN...
entry.content: I have my old account back... Just linking the content 🙂

entry.title: Re: SAP BW/4HANA: The Grey Panther of Data Warehousing
entry.content:
@Phil_from_Madrid- Spon on!

@MKreitlein - I thought I was the only one who is comfortable with "loop and read table" but now, I see that there are people who find SQL more complicated than ABAP.

1. I wonder why people do not give importance to SID and DIM ID concept of BW which I feel was ahead of its time. Because in any ETL tool, you always had to make this association/join but SAP BW used to do it for you which Datasphere lacks. So, in that sense, Datasphere is more of a demotion from what BW used to be.

2. You cannot import a data to .csv/flat file from Datasphere table which was a quite easy task in BW.

3. To place a file via process chain on CFTP/SFTP server with the use of std. FM is a quite straight forward thing, but it is quite a task or almost impossible in Datasphere.

4. Concept of openhub destination.

5. Broadcasting/scheduling functionality either via BW or from BO is missing in DSP/SAC. You cannot broadcast/schedule live datasphere data via SAC to user's e-mail ID in .xlsx or .pdf format.

6. Let's not even discuss the transport of objects in Datasphere. In my first implementation, I realized that the source system name should be abstract and same something like SWX where X stands for D, Q or P.

entry.title: Re: Migration to SAP DS 4.3
entry.content:
@Sharvari1 

I am not sure what repository wise migration means , but i will assume you are referring to a scenario where you build a new environment and do the upgrade there giving you some kind of a Zero Downtime deployment.
1. Create a new database schema
2. Use the DS 4.2 Repository Manager to create a ds 4.2 repository in the new DB schema.
3. Use al_engine cli or designer to export the repository objects from the old DS 4.2 repository to an ATL file
4. Use al_engine cli or designer to import the ATL file to the new DS 4.2 repository
5. Use the new DS 4.3 Repository to upgrade the new DS 4.2 repositories to 4.3 version.
6. Use Promotion Management to migrate CMS repository objects. The list of Objects to be promoted can be found here https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_DATA_SERVICES/5372c7960111477e9dea8931e087870c/2a3feccf1e014fd0ba9b829a06822a11.html?locale=en-US
7. Modify the repositories in CMC to ensure they point to the new 4.3 repositories
7. Register the new repositories with the Job Server
8. End-to-End testing
9. Decommission the old environment.

 

Scenario: Migrate to a new environment

Regards Joe

entry.title: Re: SAP SQL Anywhere RESTORE with RENAME - What is the correct script for restoring database
entry.content:
Hello, Chris!
I'm using Linux OS and I can share the output from the console where I started the restore:

Opening dbspace 'DBSpace_name2' in file 'Old file name 2.db' for database 'a_restore'
Opening dbspace 'DBSpace_name3' in file 'Old file name 4.db' for database 'a_restore'
Direct IO disabled for file 'Old file name 2.db' because the file system on which it resides does not support it
Cannot open dbspace 'DBSpace_name2' from file 'Old file name 2.db'
Error: Database cannot be started -- Resource temporarily unavailable
SAP SQL Anywhere

Does your CDS view have fields annotated with @Aggregation.default ?

https://help.sap.com/docs/ABAP_PLATFORM_NEW/cc0c305d2fab47bd808adcad3ca7ee9d/5e5d319bd1a74552b99a36dfc739f74d.html

entry.title: Re: Highlights of the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502 Release
entry.content:
Hello @MustafaBensan 

Nice to meet you! I am Harish from the Product Success Organization at SAP, and I’m here to help answer your question.

 For SAP S/4HANA Private Cloud, the current approach for partner add-on development remains valid. A clean core strategy is crucial for ensuring stable operations while fostering agility and innovation. Partners can utilize in-app (on-stack) or side-by-side extensibility and create extensions with the SAP Business Technology Platform (SAP BTP), using tools like SAP Cloud Platform Integration and SAP API Business Hub to develop decoupled extensions. This approach maintains upgrade stability and compatibility.

 SAP has a certification process that ensures partner add-ons are compatible with S/4HANA environments. Partners should submit their add-on to the SAP Integration and Certification Center (ICC). The ICC tests and certifies that the add-on integrates seamlessly with SAP systems and meets all technical requirements.

 For more details please check this:

  • Add-on deployment Certification for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition
  • https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_ADD-ON_ASSEMBLY_KIT
  • https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-sap/certification-of-partner-solutions-following-clean-core/ba-p/13556247
  • https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-sap/list-of-certified-abap-add-ons-for-sap-s-4hana-cloud-private-edition/ba-p/13513201

 Let me know if you have any further questions!

 Thank you.

entry.title: Re: Why I am not able to see the Branch Section in my ABA...
entry.content: It's completely different. In abapGit, "offline repository" means a list of files containing only the ABAP objects, there's no GIT concept inside this ZIP file (so, no branch). A git repository stores the ABAP objects as "git objects" which can be of type "commit", "blob" and so on, which contain the information of branches, ABAP objects, etc.

entry.title: Re: Error msg "No commitment item entered in item 00001 3000 72370040"
entry.content: Thanks ELi it worked.

Thomas

entry.title: Re: SAP SQL Anywhere RESTORE with RENAME - What is the correct script for restoring database
entry.content: Just out of curiosity: In my understanding, it's way more familiar to use IMAGE BACKUPS (i.e. each database file stored as separate files) than ARCHIVE BACKUPS, and it's also way easier to restore them by simply copying to the destination path. - Is there a particular requirement to use archive backups for you?

entry.title: Re: Production Order Change management (OCM)- 1
entry.content: Hi experts! Is there any way I can use this functionality if there are material movements in an order?

entry.title: Change process for ID change in sap ppm
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I have a requirement in my project where the scenario is to change the pre-project item type upon approval of all decision points to project item type. I am using the change process function for the same. however, the id in pre-project is different than project. Though I am able to create the change process and item type change, but the item ID is not changing as per the required coding mask.I am able to do it if the id is same for pre-project and project item type. May I know any BADI or work around for this problem? I hope I am clear.

Regards

entry.title: Re: SAP BW/4HANA: The Grey Panther of Data Warehousing
entry.content:
@FrankRiesner : Fully agree with "the open mind". In my experience, the development cycles are noticeably shorter, also because of the drag&drop for view development (other might call it low-code), but also because I feel very comfortable with expressing functionality in relational logic (aka SQL) which is now omnipresent in Datasphere (and which is very natural way of working for structured data). My point was that BW solved already plenty of aspects which are now being discussed in other products), which is also fine because Rome was not built on a single day. 

@MKreitlein & @Mandar_Damle I agree with you that DS is not (yet) that advanced as BW when it comes to develop bespoke functionality around it. The ABAP stack was a fully blown app server which is still used under S/4(!) and which is very powerful for certain tasks.

SID generation is however something owned to the past when CPU and physical data storage on HDD via Classic DB were the driving technologies. I don't miss SIDs much, even if a JOIN on INTEGER (SID) will be in most cases faster than a JOIN on a e.g. String (External key).

It's is true that defining an IOBJ was a fine functionality because of its semantic clarity, but we are approaching it step by step with the semantics of tables and views. Re the Loop at itab: This was also the way we needed to implement transformation logic in ABAP TRFNs, but many times, what we finally did was expressing nothing else than e.g. a simple JOIN in relational logic. It is so much easier to express this in DS, that's why I wrote to Frank above that it seems to me that dev cycles is DS are shorter than in BW, many things are more straight-forward. But it is true that DS also requests a deeper understanding about SQL than clasic ABAP OpenSQL (which is very limited compared to "normal" SQL) and a good knowledge of the function library. If you dominate SQL, you dominate big  parts of DS and any other DWH solution becomes easily approachable.

entry.title: Re: Issue with DataHub Deployment: PayerID Not Displaying in Production

entry.title: How to link a Storage bin / Material with a Storage Location
entry.content:
Hi,

I would like to link a dedicated a [Storage type 4 / Storage Section / Storage Bin 4] with the Storage location 2 (see below).

The idea is that when I will transfer a material in the Storage Bin 4, it will only be link with the Storage Location 2.

For your information, the Storage Location 2 has a specific setup (Storage location stock excluded from MRP) that should only apply to the [Storage type 4 / Storage Section / Storage Bin 4].

I have seen in several posts that there is no link between a Storage Location and a Storage Type / Bin so my question is :

How can I set up so that the item code that goes into Storage Bin 4 is only linked to Storage Location 2 ?

I attach an example image:

that allows me to create what is described in the previous lines?

Thank you for your support.

I know this is generate by the Time independent setting for the company code. My question is - how system determines the transaction types to be used for that transfer? (SAP ECC 6.0)

entry.title: Re: Signavio Process Insights: Flexible WF PO
entry.content:
Hello @GNunnari,

Thank you for reaching out with your inquiry regarding PO approvals in Flexible Workflow and how they are reflected in Signavio Process Insights.

Currently, our logic for approval-related KPPURCH2 flows* considers a combination of EKKO-FRGGR (Release Group) and EKKO-PROCSTAT (Processing State). However, since Flexible Workflows do not populate the EKKO-FRGGR field, these cases are not currently reflected in the context boxes. Only approval cases with a release strategy are captured.

Our team is working on the corrections. In order to stay updated, I would recommend you to open a ticket via SAP for Me under the component BPI-PI-PPI. Here is a step-by-step guideline on how to create a ticket.

Please feel free to share your ticket number in a private message so I can forward it to our responsible colleagues.

Thank you and kind regards

Ascha
(virtual Customer Success Team at SAP Signavio)

We proceeds with ./RUNINSTALLER after that it prompts for oracle installer and when we have executed "create inventory" step using OUI, the OUI gets hang in "Create Inventory directory  but not asking for next step "prerequisite checks".

We are stuck here from last one month but its hang in processing stage of "create inventory".

entry.title: Re: Can we Delete a Product ?
entry.content:
Hi,

Yes you can set mark for deletion indicator.

Regards

entry.title: Re: Migration to SAP DS 4.3
entry.content:
Hi @jmuiruri , thank you for the response!

Yes , We are looking to reduce downtime of our the environment.

I will explain repo-wise approach a bit :

Say we have 10 repositories in SAP DS 4.2 env.

During migration, we will migrate 6 repositories to SAP DS 4.3 env and keep the remaining 4 to the existing (SAP DS 4.2) environment. This will ensure that the jobs in the repositories that run in the 4.2 environment run and only the jobs belonging to the 6 repositories will be down during the migration. Once we are sure that the migrated jobs run in the SAP DS 4.3 environment, we will migrate the remaining repositories to the SAP DS environment. Please let us know if we can do this kind of migration of repositories (in chunks)?

Also, do you recommend migrating using ATL files or using Promotion Management since we have 1000 jobs per repository?

Any insights will be helpful !

Regards,

Sharvari

entry.title: Re: No QM certificate for delivery with mess QC090
entry.content:
Hi,

found the error.

Plant of commisioning was lost, have seen it in debugging the form CHARACTERISTIC_LEVEL of RQCAAP00.

After input the certificate works fine. Lot and matching characteristics were found by the system :-).

Best regards

Johannes

entry.title: Create PostgreSQL (Hyperscaler Option - Cloud) on SAP BTP and connect it to SAP Integration Suite
entry.content:
Introduction

I found some good guides and explainations to connect a PostgreSQL (On-Premise) with SAP Integration Suite. But what about PostgreSQL (Cloud) on SAP BTP? 
Many customers have a SAP BTP in place and they don't want to build up a database in their own network or in another cloud provider like Azure or AWS. So, here is my first guide to setup a PostgreSQL (Hyperscaler Option) on SAP BTP and connect it to SAP Integration Suite.

Important Links
https://help.sap.com/docs/postgresql-hyperscaler-option/postgresql-on-sap-btp-hyperscaler-option/what-is-postgresql-hyperscaler-option
https://help.sap.com/docs/postgresql-hyperscaler-option/postgresql-on-sap-btp-hyperscaler-option/service-plans-and-entitlements

Content (Steps)

1. Setup the PostgreSQL db on SAP BTP 
2. JDBC Configuration in SAP Integration Suite
3. Connect to PostgreSQL with (local) DBeaver
4. Create IFlow to push data into the db

 

1. Setup the PostgreSQL db on SAP BTP 

1.1 Log in to you SAP BTP Cockpit and go to the service marketplace of your subaccount

1.2 Search for "PostgreSQL"


1.3 Create a new instance with service plan "standard"
Note: service plan "free" is not possible here because there you have less configuration options during the creation

1.4 Set Parameters


Important Parameters:

Allow Access: <your own ip address>, <ip addresses of your BTP tenant>

<your own ip address> - it's needed for the connection from your local sql editor (DBeaver)
<ip addresses of your BTP tenant> - Otherwise Integration Suite is not able to connect to the db
https://me.sap.com/notes/0002418879 - https://help.sap.com/docs/btp/sap-business-technology-platform/regions-and-api-endpoints-available-for-cloud-foundry-environment

Public Access: Tick the checkbox

Optional:

I've unchecked Multi AZ and I've reduced the Backup Retention Period and the Memory for the tutorial (to save some money 😉). You have to check and adjust those parameters for your project.

1.5 Create the instance (Take a coffee or tea - It will take some minutes to be ready)

1.6 Create Service Key (for Authentication of Integration Suite and DBeaver)

Copy and save dbname, hostname, port, username and password for later steps

 

2. JDBC Configuration in SAP Integration Suite

2.1 Add a new resource with the credentials from the step before


JDBC URL:  jdbc:postgresql://<hostname>:<port>/dbname

 

3. Connect to PostgreSQL with (local) DBeaver

This step is needed for the creation of a table and corresponding columns that the Integration Suite is able to insert data there.

3.1 Download DBeaver or any other sql client/ editor
3.2 Connect to the db using the credentials
3.3 Create a table (e.g. employeedata)
3.4 Create columns (e.g. emp_id and emp_name)

 

 

4. Create IFlow to insert Data

4.1 Go to your Integration Suite and create a new IFlow

JDBC Receiver Adapter: Enter the JDBC Alias which you created in step 2.1

Content Modifier:

 

<root>
<Insert_Statement1>
<dbTableName action="INSERT">
<table>employeedata</table>
<access>
<emp_id>42</emp_id>
<emp_name>Brian</emp_name>
</access>
</dbTableName>
</Insert_Statement1>
</root>

 

Note: Here you can find sample batch payloads to insert multiple records: https://help.sap.com/docs/cloud-integration/sap-cloud-integration/batch-payload-and-operation

4.2 Deploy it and check via DBeaver, if your data was inserted:

entry.title: Re: CAPM - Uncaught TypeError: target.keys is not iterable

entry.title: Creating a Contact Person from Supplier CR UI
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have a question, can anyone tell me how the system understands which account group to consider when we create a Contact Person from a Supplier Master MDG CR UI? I believe we do not get to choose any Account Group of the Contact person to be created when we are inside the Supplier Master CR UI. I would like to know if there is any mapping of account groups (between main Supplier and Contact person) exists in regards to this mapping in SPRO.

My requirement is to create Contact persons with different Account Groups for different Suppliers(having different Account Groups).

Any reply would be much appreciated.

Thanks.

entry.title: Adding Condition type in Purchase inforecord App
entry.content:
Hello. I have a question while working on a public cloud project.

Since customer use imports process, I need to add a customs/freight condition code.

It seems that nothing other than the PPR0 code can be added in the purchase inforecord.

I created a ZFR1/ZOB1 code in CBC(SSCUI-101094) and created a new access order (AXX001 -> ZXX001, SSCUI-101095) and set it to purchasing organization 4310 (SSCUI-102144).

Is it true that I can assign a separate ZFR1/ZOB1 code in the purchase price condition creation (MEK1) app and that I cannot manage anything other than the PPR0 code in the inforecord?

Or is there another way?

I would like to hear the opinions of experts.

entry.title: Re: The benefits of integrating SAP Transportation Management with a Geographic Information System (

Let's have an example of multiple drop location/FU destination that can be delivered by one truck- does VSR trigger GIS routing the determine the best route ?

entry.title: how do I whitelist all the powerBI IP addresses in success factors?
entry.content:
Hi,

I need to whitelist power bi service ips in success factors but I'm struggling to do it.

I have a json file with a list of all Microsoft's IPs from here https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/download/details.aspx?id=56519.

I normally add ip addresses under an allow list for my api user in the Password & Login Policy Settings, however the list of ips in this file is too large to fit in the text box.

How do I whitelist power bi service for my api user in success factors?

Thank you.

Daniel

has anyone ever seen the following error message:
"error: unable to retrieve idp credential@sf_idp_metadata"

Thanks a lot in advance,
Nina

entry.title: Re: Can't find process and workflows tile in the monitori...
entry.content: These tiles are no longer available. The functionality has been moved into environment section of Control Tower.

entry.title: Re: Issue with DataHub Deployment: PayerID Not Displaying in Production
entry.content: Are you sending IDoc via Postman? Can you try to investigate loading orders of the extensions? It might be some extension which overrides your definition or prevents your extension to be loaded. I suggest you to investigate startup logs for both environments.

entry.title: Re: Migration cockpit - different approach shown for same project in same system different client
entry.content: Any update on this issue as we are also facing the same issue?

entry.title: Cloud Management Tools - Major Upgrade - Announcement - 22 February 2025
entry.content:
I received a notification email with the subject line ‘Cloud Management Tools - Major Upgrade - Announcement - 22 February 2025’.
I looked under ‘What's New for SAP Business Technology Platform’ to check the Upgrade content, but did not find any information that looked like that.
I would like to know the specific details of the Upgrade, as I need to explain it to my customer. Alternatively, I would like to know the URL of the page with the specific Upgrade content.

entry.title: Re: First steps to work with SAP Cloud ALM Deployment scenario for SAP ABAP systems (7.40 or higher)
entry.content:
Hello Neni, 

I would create a transport target group between Development and Quality systems and then create another transport target group between Quality and Production systems. 

I mean, create initially this transport route DEV:XXX->/TG_1/ ->QA:YYY-> /TG_2/ -> VIR:ZZZ with CTC=1, transport routes client dependent

where /TG_1/ contains QA:YYY, and /TG_2/ contains initially VIR: ZZZ

Then when you get the PRD:ZZZ real system, you can add PRD:ZZZ to this transport group /TG_2/ and remove VIR:ZZZ from it.

The change in the TMS transport route will add the TR already imported into QA:YYY, into the import buffer of PRD:ZZZ.

At Feature level you will have the DEVK9... TR released and imported until QA:YYY with target tenant /TG_2/ .

I hope this helps, best regards,

Dolores

entry.title: Can we integrate Process manager and Process Collaboration with in Process Governance
entry.content: Need assistance on Process Governance

entry.title: Re: Consume a custom CDS with parameters exposed as an OData API
entry.content:
Hi Pascal,

Thanks for the interesting blog. It really helped building my custom CDS view!

I do have on question about the response times: I can see that the first response will get back in 8 seconds, but the second response in 0.2 seconds. How is this possible?
Is SAP first buffering the entire report and then applying the filters for the first call? And for the second call they reuse the buffered data? If so, how long will the data be buffered (or else said: when can we expect another 8 second call)? This has quite an impact on perceived performance of the API.

Thanks,
Stefanie

entry.title: Table/FM to get change log of configured material characteristics
entry.content:
Dear experts,

I am looking for Table/FM to get change log of configured material characteristics. We can get change log in basic data 2->configure variant ->enviorment->change documents. But i need to create custom report and i'm unable to fetch this data through any table/FM. How to fetch this data which includes old & new value.

Thanks

Hello @kai_unewisse,

thank you very much for your fast response. 

The approach with the custom table is in our range of possibilities but the customer wants to edit the text. For example delete some words or include new sentences. With the custom table this is not possible in my opinion.   

Please correct me if I am wrong. 

Best regards, 

Tobias

entry.title: Perú, detracciones

Buenos días,

Agradecería muchisimo si alguién nos pudiera ayudar con esto.

Muchas gracias

saludos 

Ana

entry.title: Re: How to link a Storage bin / Material with a Storage L...
entry.content:
Hello @BBQMaster68 

The functionality you are looking for is Posting Changes Between Storage Locations. It is customized in SPRO: Logistics Execution -> Warehouse Management -> Interfaces -> Inventory Management -> Define Posting Changes. Make sure to read the documentation to this configuration node.

You can assign the storage location 2 to the storage type 4 here. Then when a stock quant of storage location different then 2 is placed in a bin in the storage type 4, the quant can be automatically transferred to the storage type 4. Alternatively, the transfer can be cumulatively posted with the RLLQ0100 report / the LQ01 transaction.

Bear in mind that this functionality doesn't work for storage types with storage unit management. 

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Rehiring an Employee Removes the Payment Method
entry.content:
When re-hiring an employee, you notice that the Payment Method has been removed and the Main Bank Account is unchecked.

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Rehiring an Employee Removes the Payment Method
entry.content:
You have rehired the Employee to a different Org unit. Whenever an employee is rehired to a new org unit its old main bank and payment method is cleared off. This is provided as functionality in the system because whenever an employee changes company he would want to change his bank for payment. So clearing off the main bank indicator is safer option, than to make payments to a wrong account.

For the employees which are hired in the same company, there will be no changes.

Please select the preferred Payment method and reselect the Main bank Account if the same details need to be maintained or else add the details as required.

entry.title: Re: Reading long text for MIC in a inspection plan / S4 H...
entry.content: Thank you, for the SAP S/4HANA 2021 how to activate Long Texts in RR (QM_RR_LONGTEXT).

https://api.sap.com/api/sapdme_bom/tryout
https://api.sap.com/api/sapdme_material/overview
How can I have this information?

entry.title: Re: Table/FM to get change log of configured material cha...
entry.content:
Hello @Suryansh_jain 

Change documents are stored in CDHDR and CDPOS tables. See SAP Help Read and Edit Change Documents

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: Check if a Material is batch managed
entry.content:
Hello @Ricardofs 

You can read material batch management indicators with BPAI_MATERIAL_GET_ALL function.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

You're welcome to connect with our current SAP Champions as well. You can also meet our new SAP Champions announced recently. Feel free to reach out to these community leaders!

entry.title: Re: SAP
entry.content: Welcome @SUDERESAN23 - thank you for joining SAP Community. I would recommend that you join the SAP Learning group, and ask your question there - the colleagues there can give you some great advice!

a great blog article. Many thanks to you.

Kind regards

Migel

entry.title: Re: SAP Captcha in SAP CDC - Gigya
entry.content:
Hi @S_Sarkar 

SAP CAPTCHA in SAP Customer Data Cloud (formerly Gigya) is part of the core offering, so there’s no separate charge for enabling this feature. It's available to all existing customers using SAP CDC, so you won’t need to pay an extra fee for it.

As for notifying SAP, there's no need to submit a support ticket just to enable the CAPTCHA. You can simply enable it through the CDC console as needed. A support ticket would only be necessary if you encounter any issues with the feature or need additional help troubleshooting or configuring it.

hope this is helpful.

Regards,
Anand Raj

entry.title: Re: Health Monitoring with Cloud ALM - Custom Metrics for S/4 HANA private cloud Part 1 (Postman)
entry.content:
Hi,

Here is my request body for the example:

{
    "resourceMetrics": [
        {
            "resource": {
                "attributes": [
                    {
                        "key": "service.name",
                        "value": {
                            "stringValue": "SID400"
                        }
                    }
                ]
            },
            "scopeMetrics": [
                {
                    "scope": {
                        "name": "HM_ANALYTICS_DP",
                        "version": "V1"
                    },
                    "metrics": [
                        {
                            "name": "Custom.SM13.Errors",
                            "description": "SM13 Update Requests with Errors",
                            "gauge": {
                                "dataPoints": [
                                    {
                                        "timeUnixNano": "{{CURRENT_TIMESTAMP_NANO}}",
                                        "asDouble": 5.0,
                                        "attributes": [
                                            {
                                                "key": "Client",
                                                "value": {
                                                    "stringValue": "400"
                                                }
                                            },
                                            {
                                                "key": "Instance",
                                                "value": {
                                                    "stringValue": "hostname_SID_00"
                                                }
                                            },
                                            {
                                                "key": "Sid",
                                                "value": {
                                                    "stringValue": "SID"
                                                }
                                            }
                                        ]
                                    }
                                ]
                            }
                        }
                    ]
                }
            ]
        }
    ]
}
 
What do you need to help?

entry.title: The description field does not display any content.
entry.content:
Dear Experts 

I have created a New DB Throw Solution packager  and my version is 10  FB 2111

but after DB working I face an issue regarding the Description field in the  Production Order and Bill of Material (BoM) fields within our SAP system. Specifically, the Description field does not display any content

Although it appears on other screens Like PO,SO, ....etc

Can anyone help me to solve this issue 

I attached a screenshot of the issue ..

Regards

entry.title: ALV Tress is collapsing or unexpended after selecting any checkbox.
entry.content: I have a problem in ALV_TREE's display. Initially, after doing some process, I will get screen which contains an ALV tree that contains a checkbox and tree is expanded. When I am selecting any checkbox, then the respective children are getting collapsed or tree is unexpanded. What can be the reason? How can I avoid the collapse of a tree after selecting any checkbox, or where can I look for this collapse functionality??

entry.title: Re: Chemical Vs. Material in EHS S/4HANA
entry.content:
Hello Ali, 

If you want to be able to use the process of waste management, you need to have the waste material created as usual. In case you want to make use of the risk assessment of the chemical for process purposes with your client,t all you need to do is

1. Create the necessary data (waste material)

2. Change to chemicals

3 Go to the chemical that responds to the waste material 

4. Assign the material to the chemical

5. You can proceed with the risk assessment of the chemical

6 you can proceed with the usual waste management process.

Its important to mention that you will have an indication of the risk assessment of the chemical within the Chemical management application, but if you switch to Waste material, there you will not see the risk assessment

entry.content: Now, Analytic model can be read as well with open sql user created in space. @albertosimeoni

entry.title: Re: The Next Generation Intercompany Solution: Intercompany Matching & Reconciliation
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

Point no-1)Did anyone cater the TDS scenario in ICMR. AP transaction is posted with 98(Amount(100) - TDS(2)), whereas AR is posted with total amount(100). So in this case if my matching expression has Leading transaction currency =Partner transaction currency system will not matched the transaction , it will come as unreconciled after matching run.

 

Point no-2)Also after scheduling matching run- status is showing as scheduled after multiple refresh, system is not generating result & log.

entry.title: Re: how to update table: DMS_PHIO2FILE and field name: FI...
entry.content: its a requirement. I'm not sure which bapi works, it could be BAPI_DOCUMENT_CHANGE2

entry.title: Re: Efficient ways to shared SAP HANA Cloud HANA Database...
entry.content: Yes, for PROD, we prefered to have a separated instance. This way, we are able to test HANA Cloud upgrades first on non-prod before doing them on prod.

entry.title: Re: Why I am not able to see the Branch Section in my ABA...
entry.content: You may access an ABAP system by http. It's what the abapGitServer is about.

entry.title: Re: Cloud Manual Bank Reconciliation Configuration
entry.content: IMHO second link requires S-id (works for me)

entry.title: Re: Invoice before doing a good issue in S4
entry.content: Yes that standard routine will take care of your requirement

entry.title: Updated Stay Certified available for SAP Sales Cloud Version 2
entry.content:
Hello learners!

On behalf of the SAP CX Product Learning team, I am pleased to inform you about the release of our SAP Sales Cloud Version 2 Stay Certified Assessment.

SAP Stay Certified provides you the opportunity to familiarize yourself with the latest updates and product changes and keep your certification valid. This Stay Certified program contains 

  • Webinar recording: SAP Sales Cloud Version 2 - Generative AI & Machine Learning - This material will help you learn about the recent enhancements in SAP Sales Cloud V2 to prepare for the assessment and stay certified.
  • A live session scheduled for May 15th 2025, another option provided as preparation material.
  • An assessment which checks your knowledge on the latest features. 

Please Note:

1. Stay Certified is accessible only to those who have been Certified on SAP Sales Cloud Version 2. If you haven't obtained your certification, please so do here:  https://learning.sap.com/certifications/sap-certified-associate-implementation-consultant-sap-sales-cloud-version-2 

2. You will need an SAP Learning Hub  subscription to access Stay Certified as well as Certification.

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: ABAP CDS Release News 2408 – External Entities
entry.content:
Hi @FlaviuBodea 

Currently, external entities are available in Cloud systems only and they can be used to connect to other public Cloud systems - SAP S/4HANA Cloud, SAP BTP ABAP environment, or SAP HANA Cloud.

The feature will most likely be available with the next big on premise shipment 2025.

Does that answer your question?

entry.title: Flush method is sap mdg fpm
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We have used the custom uibb in MDG-C where i have a doubt as below.

When we create the Change request for Change Process, is the below code is really required as there will not be any change when the user click on the "Create Change Request" button. Kindly confirm me the same.

Consider performance, felt like to keep additional logic to skip below code when user click create CR button. Thanks

    CALL METHOD super->if_fpm_guibb_list~flush
      EXPORTING
        it_change_log   = it_change_log
        it_data         = it_data
        iv_old_lead_sel = iv_old_lead_sel
        iv_new_lead_sel = iv_new_lead_sel.

Regards,

KArthik S

entry.title: Re: SAP Build and SAP Build Code: Comprehensive Tools for Novice to Expert Developers
entry.content:
Thanks @PierreCol for the information. That really helps, and those links you shared, especially the learning journey are very useful as I am tasked to prepare a case for our executive committee about BTP services and benefits.

Very much appreciated.

entry.title: Re: HANA CDS views using Visual Studio Code app by connec...
entry.content:
.hdbcds files are deprecated (see Moving From .hdbcds To .hdbtable | capire )
If you want to create .cds files on top of existing tables, you should use the annotation @CDS.persistence.exists (see Configure an SAP CAP Application to Work with Native SAP HANA Artifacts | SAP Help Portal )
